methodology.percentile_method: raw sample at index ceil(p * (n-1)), no interpolation
methodology.spec_step: §9 all 13 steps + §9 step 13 emit via NullSink (true Allow per call)
methodology.notes: L0 measures the full aps_check Allow pipeline. Single thread, 1024-entry pool of pre-finalized actions with incrementing sequence_ids; authority.sequence_next is reset to ALLOW_SEQ_START when the pool wraps (untimed atomic store). Every per-call sample is a true Allow. Earlier L0 result from commit 913cb12 used one action repeatedly and got SEQUENCE_REPLAY for iters 1..N — same BLAKE3 floor, but artifact label did not match measurement. Concurrent L0-concurrent-1.json uses the same corrected methodology by construction.
